name: Wall Financial Corporation
summary: Wall Financial Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a real estate investment and development company in Canada. It operates through three segments: Rental, Hotel, and Development. The company owns and manages residential and commercial properties; owns and manages hotel properties; and develops and sells residential housing properties. It also engages in the development and management of residential rental units; and development and construction of residential housing for re-sale. As of January 31, 2020, it owned hotel units was 934; and thirteen rental properties in Metro Vancouver, consisting of 1,390 residential and ten commercial rental units. Wall Financial Corporation was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
